# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:

        protocols:

          - PUT

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /payments
          - /payments/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        path_handling: v0

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: users-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.internal:8080
        weight: 150
      - target: orders-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-3.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: X-Tenant-Id
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: inventory-a.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-b.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: payments-primary.internal:8080
        weight: 200
      - target: payments-secondary.internal:8080
        weight: 50

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Tenant-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
      credentials: false
      max_age: 3600

  - name: prometheus

  - name: request-transformer
    service: users-service
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Forwarded-Service:users-service

  - name: request-transformer
    service: orders-service
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Forwarded-Service:orders-service

  - name: request-transformer
    service: inventory-service
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Forwarded-Service:inventory-service

  - name: request-transformer
    service: payments-service
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Forwarded-Service:payments-service
